delivery_changes.label: New delivery structure
delivery_changes.detail: Small courier £29 / Medium B&S £49 / Large B&S £79 / Dining ≤3 £9 / Dining ≥4 £19

delivery_changes.label: Dining chairs increase
delivery_changes.detail: Dining ≥4 chairs £19→£29. DPD Freight items (oversized/heavy) also defaulted to £29 for ≤3 chairs.

delivery_changes.label: Medium & Large increase
delivery_changes.detail: Medium B&S £49→£59 / Large B&S £79→£89. DX 2-crew medium remains £49.

delivery_changes.label: Small furniture increase
delivery_changes.detail: Small furniture (incl. dining ≤3 chairs) £9→£15 via DPD

delivery_changes.label: Medium & Large increase
delivery_changes.detail: Medium B&S £59→£69 / Large B&S £89→£99. Current structure: Large £99 / Medium B&S £69 / Medium DX £49 / Mattresses £29 / Small £15 / Accessories £6 / Large accessories £29

current_delivery.examples: Beds, dining tables, dining sets, sideboards, recliner chairs
Armchairs, TV units, coffee tables, chest of drawers
Dining chairs (≤3), bar stools, small tables. 4+ dining chairs or heavy items: £29
Table lamps, soft furnishings, clocks, home decor, plants
Rugs, ceiling/floor lamps, mirrors, wall art over 1m/30kg
Items requiring 2+ person delivery due to size/weight
All furniture and accessories from 4 warehouses or 11 stores
